overview: These fish are likely a type of carp or goldfish, commonly found in outdoor ponds and water gardens. They are known for being robust, docile, and social creatures that can live for many years under proper care. Carp and goldfish are omnivorous, adapting their diet to consume insects, crustaceans, algae, and vegetation.
